title: Dejiko Arrives!
overview: Dejiko arrives in Akihabara along with Puchiko, and Gema, but the trio suddenly realizes that they have nowhere to stay!

title: Call me Rabi-en-Rose
overview: Much to his chagrin, Dejiko's long-time rival, Rabi-en-Rose (whose real name is much less impressive) makes a sudden appearance.

title: Spooky Store
overview: A boy looking for trading cards helps Rabi-en-Rose, but is frightened by the spooky appearance of the store.

title: What's That?
overview: Dejiko, Gema, and Puchiko decide to go out for a picnic. On their excursion, they meet a mysterious yellow bear in a box.

title: Mr. Longhair
overview: A handsome man visits the store and comments on how Dejiko, Gema, and Puchiko speak, only to show a particular interest in Puchiko.

title: Bukimi-buu
overview: Dejiko's tail is found by two otaku named Takeshi and Yoshimi. Will this spell disaster or hilarity?

title: Gema, Gema pssshuuu...
overview: When Dejiko kicks Gema into water, something crazy happens: he begins to grow! Will Gema ever get back to normal size?

title: Me-Kara-Beam Doesn't Work-nyu
overview: Puchiko knows that she has the potential to use her Me-Kara-Beam, but Dejiko has a crucial element that would allow her to use it.

title: Romantic... In A Particular Way
overview: Takurou is miraculously saved from sickness by a pre-henshin form of Rabi-en-rose who tells her of his history.

title: False Dejiko!
overview: Takurou is robbed! Worse, she identifies the perpetrator as none other than... Dejiko? What could have brought this on?

title: Hot Steamy Rice
overview: Dreams are a place where you can do, be, or… eat anything? Dejiko and Puchiko dream about rice and all its wonders.

title: Monster and Co. Attack!
overview: Akihabara is under attack from a fierce monster! Will Dejiko, Gema, and Puchiko be able to save their new home?

title: Possesed By Spirit-nyo
overview: The unthinkable happens: Dejiko is possessed by a... clam spirit? No worries, Takurou is on the case!

title: Hooligans Visit
overview: When a hooligan named Abarenbou visits Akihabara, the usually calm, but bustling, city becomes a hotbed of chaos!

title: Party Night
overview: It's time to party with Dejiko and the gang! Get into the celebratory spirit with the music video "Party Night!"

title: Usada's Big Bang
overview: Dejiko gifts a deliciously dangerous Christmas cake to Usada, also known as Rabi-en-rose, with hopes of getting rid of her once and for all.
